title: Two-Tone Black & Gold Medium Ceramic Plant Flower Pot Round Modern Stylish Simple Design for Indoor House Plants Succulents 1 x Medium Black & Gold Ceramic Pots by Thompson and Morgan
features: medium two-tone Black and Gold ceramic pot that adds a modern touch to your indoor house plant display.
With a sturdy yet stylish design, these plant pots are great for the modern home!
Ideal for all kinds of indoor plants - from flowers to succulents and everything in-between.
Two-Tone Black and Gold Ceramic Pot, 1 x 10.5cm Medium Ceramic Pot
description: Add a contemporary feel to your house plant displays with our two-tone black and gold pots. Made from sturdy ceramic and with a stylish round design, they are great for the modern home. Simplistic but attractive, this pot will brighten up your home, looking wonderful when placed on windowsills or even as a table-top display. They can be used for all kinds of indoor plants, from flowers to succulents and everything in-between. Available in small, medium or large, you can get a full set for a coordinated display, or just one size for a stand out feature. Ideal as a treat for yourself, or for gifting to friends and family - great for buying with a plant for a housewarming gift! 1 x Medium Ceramic Pot Delivered with growing and care instructions Images shown are for guidance only of the expected results from plants upon maturity. Different growing conditions might vary results. Image may be included for illustration of supply but can vary due to seasonality changes (e.g. deciduous plants lose leaves in colder months).
